name: Mollog's Mob
inspire: After your leader ({icon:leader}) is given a damage token, if they have 4 or more damage tokens, Inspire each friendly fighter.

abilities.name: Lurker
abilities.rulesText:
When you deploy a friendly Stalagsquig, you can place it in an empty hex that does not contain a feature token and that is not a starting hex in enemy territory.

A friendly Stalagsquig cannot Move, be pushed or be removed from the battlefield unless it is slain. It is always treated as having a Charge token.

abilities.name: Troggoth Regeneration
abilities.rulesText: Use this at the end of each battle round after following the end phase sequence. Heal your leader ({icon:leader}).

abilities.name: Unnatural Hazards
abilities.flavorText: Wherever Mollog roams, the creepy-crawly nature of the deep-earth dankholds seems to come with him.
abilities.rulesText:
At the start of the first Action step in each battle round, pick 1 of the following effects. Each effect can only be picked once per game.

• Until the end of the battle round, enemy fighters adjacent to a friendly minion ({icon:minion}) are Surrounded.

• Until the end of the battle round, each time an enemy fighter is placed in, is pushed into or enters a hex adjacent to a friendly minion ({icon:minion}), give that enemy fighter a Stagger token.

• Until the end of the battle round, the first time each enemy fighter is placed in, is pushed into or enters a hex adjacent to a friendly minion ({icon:minion}), roll an Attack dice. On a {icon:fury} or {icon:crit}, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

abilities.name: Tag Along
abilities.flavorText: Mollog doesn't exactly command his peculiar menagerie of troglodytes, but they can be trusted to follow him anyway.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your leader ({icon:leader}) Moves. Pick another friendly fighter. Push that fighter up to 2 hexes. That push must end either adjacent to your leader ({icon:leader}) or adjacent to an enemy fighter that is adjacent to your leader ({icon:leader}).

abilities.name: Infestation
abilities.flavorText: Even if one of Mollog's critters is killed, another pops up to take its place.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in your Power step. Pick a slain friendly minion ({icon:minion}). Raise that fighter, place them in an empty starting hex and then give them a Charge token. You can only use this ability once per game.
